query: 主动权益基金中，规模前50里本年以来收益率最高的10只

args.sql: WITH top_funds AS ( SELECT s.fund_code, s.fund_name, s.fund_size, p.portfolio_return FROM fund_size s JOIN fund_performance p ON s.fund_code = p.fund_code WHERE s.asset_type = '主动权益' AND p.period = '本年以来' AND s.fund_code IN ( SELECT fund_code FROM fund_size WHERE asset_type = '主动权益' ORDER BY fund_size DESC LIMIT 50 ) ) SELECT fund_code AS "基金代码", fund_name AS "基金名称", fund_size AS "规模", ROUND(portfolio_return * 100, 2) AS "本年以来收益率" FROM top_funds ORDER BY portfolio_return DESC LIMIT 10;

plan.rationale: 查询主动权益基金中规模前50的基金，按本年以来的收益率降序排列，取前10名

notes: 未指定规模日期，使用最新的fund_size日期
未指定业绩区间，默认使用'本年以来'
查询主动权益基金中规模前50的基金，按本年以来的收益率降序排列，取前10名
